scenario.name: Banana Dash
scenario.summary: Four agents race to deliver the banana while contesting pickups and forced drops.

director.objective: Rule conflicts fairly and narrate briefly.
instructions: Keep narration to one overlay line.
For contested_object, choose a listed contender or deny.
For forced_drop, use policy and recent history; fumbles are occasional.

narrate_scene.purpose: Turn the supplied play facts into one short Banana Dash call.
instructions: Sound like an old-timey radio baseball announcer.
Name the active agents and call the play in motion.
Never summarize inventory or say generic lines like Powerups available.
